title: Newbie starting-kit definition (v1)
description: The single newbie-kit file at data/newbie-kit.json. Defines the starting gold purse and provisions granted to every brand-new character once, at the moment character creation completes. It bootstraps the early-game economy (hunger/thirst decay, food/water costing gold) so a fresh level-1 character is not simultaneously broke, hungry and thirsty. Applied only at creation; existing saves are never re-kitted.

starting_gold.description: Gold added to a new character's purse at creation. Kept small: enough for a few meals and a repair, not enough to skip the early game.

starting_items.description: Items placed directly into a new character's inventory at creation. Each item id must exist under data/items/.

quantity.description: How many copies of the item to grant. Defaults to 1 when omitted.
